mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_ID , BUYER_ID , ITEM_CODE , QTY , STATUS , ORDER_DATE FROM TB_ORDER WHERE BUYER_ID LIKE #{buyerId} || '%' AND ITEM_CODE LIKE #{itemCode} || '%' AND STATUS IN ('A','B') AND ORDER_DATE BETWEEN NVL(#{from}, '00000000') AND NVL(#{to}, '99999999')
SELECT ORDER_ID , BUYER_ID , ITEM_CODE , QTY , STATUS FROM TB_ORDER WHERE BUYER_ID LIKE #{buyerId} || '%' AND STATUS IN ('C')

SELECT R.PRI , R.LANE_CODE , S.STEP_CODE , S.SEQ AS STEP_SEQ , R.SEQ AS LANE_SEQ , S.ORDER_ID FROM TB_STEP_ROUTE S JOIN TB_LANE_ROUTE R ON S.LANE_ROUTE_ID = R.LANE_ROUTE_ID WHERE S.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND R.PRI = #{pri} AND S.USED_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY S.SEQ, STEP_SEQ
SELECT PRI AS VALUE , PRI || ' Group' AS DISPLAY_VALUE FROM TB_LANE_ROUTE WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} GROUP BY PRI ORDER BY PRI
SELECT 'LANE_CODE' AS MASTER_CODE , LANE_CODE AS VALUE , NULL AS DISPLAY_VALUE FROM TB_BASE_LANE_ROUTE WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId} GROUP BY LANE_CODE ORDER BY LANE_CODE
SELECT 'STEP_CODE' AS MASTER_CODE , STEP_CODE AS VALUE , NULL AS DISPLAY_VALUE FROM TB_BASE_STEP_ROUTE WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId} ORDER BY STEP_CODE
SELECT LANE_CODE , LANE_ROUTE_ID , SEQ FROM TB_LANE_ROUTE WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND PRI = #{pri} AND USED_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT R.LANE_CODE , S.STEP_CODE , S.STEP_ROUTE_ID , S.LANE_ROUTE_ID FROM TB_STEP_ROUTE S JOIN TB_LANE_ROUTE R ON S.LANE_ROUTE_ID = R.LANE_ROUTE_ID WHERE S.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND R.PRI = #{pri} AND S.USED_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY S.SEQ
